title: Native to Flutter Migration Manifest
description: Schema for documenting native iOS/Android codebases for Flutter migration

generated_at.description: Timestamp when this manifest was generated

features.description: Unified list of features/screens across both platforms

platform_apis.description: Platform-specific APIs that need special handling

error_handling.description: Error handling and crash reporting analysis

feature_reports_path.description: Path to the docs/features/ directory containing per-feature reports

EffortSize.description: T-shirt sizing for effort estimation: XS (<1 day), S (1-2 days), M (3-5 days), L (1-2 weeks), XL (2+ weeks)

rationale.description: WHY this is a risk - detailed reasoning explaining the technical context

impact.description: What happens if this risk materializes

mitigation.description: Strategy to address or reduce the risk

affected_features.description: Feature IDs impacted by this risk

additionalProperties.description: Percentage of screens using this framework

id.description: Unique feature identifier (used for Flutter package naming)

api_dependencies.description: API endpoint IDs this feature uses

data_model_dependencies.description: Data model IDs this feature uses

platform_api_dependencies.description: Platform API IDs this feature requires

feature_dependencies.description: Other feature IDs this depends on

effort_size.description: T-shirt size estimate for migration effort

parity_notes.description: Differences between iOS and Android implementations

usage_locations.description: Feature IDs or file paths where this is used

effort_size.description: T-shirt size estimate for dependency migration

swagger_source.description: Path to Swagger/OpenAPI file if provided

endpoints_from_spec.description: Whether endpoints were derived from Swagger/OpenAPI spec

parity_issues.description: Differences between iOS and Android models

effort_size.description: T-shirt size estimate for platform API integration

TestingInfrastructure.description: Testing infrastructure analysis for both platforms

deployment_targets.description: Where builds are deployed (TestFlight, App Store, etc.)
Where builds are deployed (Play Store, Firebase, etc.)

uses_swiftgen.description: Whether SwiftGen is used for type-safe access

supported_locales.description: List of supported locale codes (from res/values-XX)

arb_generation.description: Whether ARB files can be auto-generated from native strings

dynamic_type.description: Whether Dynamic Type (font scaling) is supported

reduce_motion.description: Whether Reduce Motion preference is respected

font_scaling.description: Whether font scaling is supported (sp units)

touch_target_size.description: Whether minimum touch target sizes are met

accessibility_scanner_issues.description: Number of issues from Accessibility Scanner

ErrorHandlingAnalysis.description: Error handling and crash reporting analysis

provider.description: Crash reporting service (Crashlytics, Sentry, Bugsnag, etc.)

result_pattern.description: Whether Result type pattern is used

global_error_handler.description: Whether a global error handler exists

uses_scene_delegate.description: Whether SceneDelegate is used for multi-scene support

pre_main_operations.description: Operations before main() (load commands, static initializers)

uses_content_providers.description: Whether ContentProviders are used for initialization

critical_path.description: Initialization steps that block app display

blocking_operations.description: Operations running on main thread during startup

estimated_cold_start_time.description: Estimated cold start time in milliseconds

InitStep.description: A single initialization step in the startup sequence

blocking.description: Whether this step blocks the main thread

dependencies.description: Other init steps this depends on

critical_path.description: Feature IDs that must be completed in order

parallelizable_features.description: Groups of feature IDs that can be migrated in parallel

prerequisites.description: Phase IDs that must complete first

technical_constraints.description: Technical constraints from platform API usage
